other_observers: none; Don Hall found the bird. Connie Kogler also saw this bird.
description: Medium sized dove with large white wing patches. Long slighty droopy black bill. Tear-drop shaped blue orbital ring. Gray-brown head, neck, back, belly, and upperwings, with darker brown primaries. Black mark on face below eye. Tail slightly rounded and tipped with broad white.Behaviors: Bird was calling and displaying.Call: low pitched cooingPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper
